category_title: At-risk students in the Normal Technical stream exhibiting attention-seeking or disengaged behaviors
scenario_title: Disruptive behavior during formal keyboard instruction
minimal_context: The student is in a keyboard lab trying to learn chords C, F, G, and A using a handout and patterns written on the board.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the handout showing the notes and the patterns I wrote on the board. We are going to practice playing the chords C, F, G, and A.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Touches the keyboard immediately) I want to try it, but I'm having a hard time following the chord changes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep trying to follow the pattern. I am going to step away for a minute.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Keeps pressing keys while losing focus) I can't get the changes right.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep practicing the chords on your handout.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Cannot stop himself from touching the keyboard and decides to play the keyboard really loudly, becoming very disruptive)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please look at the handout showing the notes and the patterns I wrote on the board. We are going to practice playing the chords C, F, G, and A.

STUDENT: (Touches the keyboard immediately) I want to try it, but I'm having a hard time following the chord changes.

TUTOR: Just keep trying to follow the pattern. I am going to step away for a minute.

STUDENT: (Keeps pressing keys while losing focus) I can't get the changes right.

TUTOR: Keep practicing the chords on your handout.

STUDENT: (Cannot stop himself from touching the keyboard and decides to play the keyboard really loudly, becoming very disruptive)

task.content: Learning chords C, F, G, and A on the keyboard using a handout showing notes and patterns written on the board

context.materials: Keyboard, computer, handout showing notes, board with patterns, box notation
context.social_setting: Highly instruction-based lesson overseen by a teacher
context.time_context: At the beginning of a keyboard program

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: After the teacher left him during instructions
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Cannot stop himself touching the keyboard, decided to play the keyboard really loudly
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Really keen, interest in the keyboard and he really wants to try it

behavior_patterns.condition: When the students had a hard time following the chord changes
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Not very focused so it was very disruptive
